post.summary: Sign in with email and password
Restore pending-deletion account with email and password
Restore pending-deletion account with refresh token
post.description: Used by OAuth callback flows after the provider has returned a valid Supabase refresh token. The endpoint restores only the account matching that token; it never accepts a user id. The refresh token may be supplied either in the request body OR via the httpOnly qb_refresh_token cookie (injected server-side), which is why `refresh_token` is optional in the body schema; a 400 is returned when neither source provides one.

400.description: Missing token or account is not restorable

post.description: Sets a new password for the session identified by the Authorization Bearer token (a Supabase recovery session, or a logged-in user adding/changing a password). The token is read from the Authorization header, not the body.

post.summary: Exchange a provider-issued OIDC id_token for a session
post.description: Used by client-side OAuth flows like Google Identity Services and Sign in with Apple that return a signed id_token instead of doing a browser redirect. Required for in-app browsers where the classic OAuth redirect endpoint is blocked.

get.description: Detects the request country and reports whether Georgian phone sign-in should be shown to the client.

post.summary: Start Georgian phone OTP sign-in or sign-up
post.description: Starts Supabase phone OTP for Georgian mobile numbers only. SMS delivery is handled by the configured Supabase Send SMS hook.

post.summary: Start linking a Georgian phone number
post.description: Starts a Supabase phone-change OTP for the authenticated account. Use this from Settings so Google/email users link a phone to the same account.

200.description: Verification code sent or already linked

post.description: Verifies the phone-change OTP and stores the verified phone number on the current QuizBall user.

post.summary: Supabase Send SMS hook for SMSOffice
post.description: Called by Supabase Auth Send SMS hook. Sends only Georgian phone OTP messages through SMSOffice. Authenticated by the shared hook secret in the Authorization Bearer header.

get.description: Receives SMSOffice delivery status updates. Responds with plain text OK. Authenticated by the shared callback secret in the `secret` query parameter.
Polls SMSOffice message status by destination and reference. Intended for manual/internal verification. Authenticated by the shared hook secret in the Authorization Bearer header.

get.summary: Get head-to-head summary for two users
Get recent matches for authenticated user
Get aggregate match stats for authenticated user
Get ranked profile for authenticated user

post.summary: Purchase non-coin-pack products with coin balance

400.description: Insufficient coins or invalid product type

post.description: Local development helper for quickly granting coins/tickets to the authenticated user.

post.summary: Schedule current user account for deletion

get.summary: Get public profile for a user

post.summary: Reset onboarding flag for the current admin (dev-only)
post.description: Dev-only. Requires admin role and NODE_ENV='local'. Flips onboarding_complete back to false so the onboarding flow can be re-tested. Operates on the caller's own user.

post.summary: Restore a user account pending deletion
post.description: Requires admin role. Only works before the 30-day grace period expires.

get.summary: Get achievements for the current user
Get achievements for a specific user
List accepted friends for the authenticated user
List incoming and outgoing friend requests
List current daily and weekly objectives for the current user

post.description: Records the caller (anonymous or logged-in) as currently online and returns the site-wide online count. Public — accepts requests without authentication.

get.description: Returns the current count of visitors online site-wide.

delete.description: Delete a category. Use cascade=true to also delete associated questions. Requires admin role.

schema.description: Set to "true" to delete associated questions before deleting the category

409.description: Category has children or questions (when cascade=false)

get.description: Returns child categories, associated questions, and featured status

200.description: List of featured categories with joined category data

404.description: One or more featured category IDs not found

get.summary: List questions with pagination and filters

post.summary: Create a new question with payload

get.summary: Get question by ID with payload

post.description: Create multiple questions in a single request. Maximum 100 questions per upload. Requires admin role.

400.description: Invalid request or category not found

get.description: Detect questions with identical prompt text. Returns groups of questions with the same prompt, either within the same category or across different categories. Requires admin role.

schema.description: Include draft questions in search (default: true)

post.summary: Check for duplicate prompts before bulk upload
post.description: Check if question prompts already exist in the database. Used during bulk upload preview to show users which questions are duplicates. Requires admin role.

prompts.description: Array of question prompts to check

example.en: What is the capital of France?

get.summary: List active daily challenges for the current user

post.summary: Create a playable daily challenge session
Complete a daily challenge for the day

delete.summary: Reset today completion for a daily challenge (dev-only)

403.description: Not allowed to use dev reset

put.summary: Update one daily challenge CMS config
